title.en: The 802.1CB YANG Data Model: Modules, Conformance, and References
title.zh: 802.1CB 的 YANG 数据模型：模块、一致性与参考文献

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1CB defines Frame Replication and Elimination for Reliability (FRER) — a Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) feature that copies a stream onto multiple paths and then merges the copies so a single link failure causes no packet loss. But a feature is useless if you cannot configure it remotely. The 802.1CBcv-2021 amendment adds a YANG data model: a machine-readable schema that lets a network controller read and write every FRER and Stream Identification setting over a standard protocol. YANG (Yet Another Next Generation) is the IETF modeling language used to describe the configuration and operational state of network devices. Clause 12 is where 802.1CBcv defines that model.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1CB 定义了「面向可靠性的帧复制与消除」（FRER, Frame Replication and Elimination for Reliability）——这是时间敏感网络（TSN, Time-Sensitive Networking）的一项功能：它把一条流复制到多条路径上，再把这些副本合并，使得单条链路故障不会造成丢包。但如果无法远程配置，这项功能就毫无意义。802.1CBcv-2021 修正案补充了一个 YANG 数据模型：一种机器可读的模式（schema），让网络控制器能够通过标准协议读写每一项 FRER 与流识别（Stream Identification）的设置。YANG（Yet Another Next Generation）是 IETF 用来描述网络设备配置与运行状态的建模语言。第 12 章正是 802.1CBcv 定义该模型的地方。

blocks.en: 12.1 (YANG Framework) sets the ground rules. The model follows IETF RFC 6087 (guidelines for YANG authors). It uses a hierarchical Uniform Resource Name (URN) — ieee is the root namespace, then the standard, then the working group. Crucially, a network port is modeled as an interface, so 802.1CB builds on (augments) the generic IETF Interface Management model from RFC 8343 rather than reinventing it. Two device-level top objects (Stream Identification and FRER) hang off that interface tree, as shown in the general YANG hierarchy of Figure 12-1.
blocks.zh: 12.1（YANG 框架）确立了基本规则。该模型遵循 IETF RFC 6087（YANG 编写者指南）。它使用分层的统一资源名（URN, Uniform Resource Name）——ieee 是根命名空间，其次是标准，再次是工作组。关键在于：网络端口被建模为一个接口（interface），因此 802.1CB 是在 RFC 8343 的通用 IETF 接口管理模型之上进行「扩展（augment）」，而非另起炉灶。两个设备级顶层对象（流识别与 FRER）挂接在该接口树上，如图 12-1 的通用 YANG 层次结构所示。

blocks.en: 12.2 (IEEE Std 802.1CB YANG model) explains where the data structures come from: they are derived from UML (Unified Modeling Language, OMG version 2.5) diagrams, which in turn are based on the management behavior in Clause 9 (Stream Identification) and Clause 10 (FRER) of the base standard. In these UML-like figures, a white box is information owned by another body (e.g., IETF), and a gray box is an object this IEEE standard itself defines. 12.2.1 (Stream Identification model) draws the stream-identity object and its mutually-exclusive identification choices — null, source-MAC-and-VLAN, destination-MAC-and-VLAN, and IP — plus the per-port and per-port-per-stream counters that augment the RFC 8343 interface statistics. 12.2.2 (FRER model) draws the FRER objects: sequence generation, recovery, identification, stream-split, and autoconfiguration, and shows how FRER augments the Stream Identification model with a lan-path-id.
blocks.zh: 12.2（IEEE Std 802.1CB YANG 模型）说明这些数据结构的来源：它们派生自 UML（统一建模语言，Unified Modeling Language，OMG 2.5 版）图，而这些图又基于基础标准中第 9 章（流识别）与第 10 章（FRER）的管理行为。在这些类 UML 图中，白色方框表示属于其他组织（如 IETF）的信息，灰色方框表示本 IEEE 标准自身定义的对象。12.2.1（流识别模型）绘制了 stream-identity 对象及其互斥的识别方式选择——空识别、源 MAC 加 VLAN、目的 MAC 加 VLAN、以及 IP——还有扩展 RFC 8343 接口统计的每端口与每端口每流计数器。12.2.2（FRER 模型）绘制了 FRER 对象：序列生成、恢复、识别、流拆分与自动配置，并展示了 FRER 如何用 lan-path-id 扩展流识别模型。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 420 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><rect x="150" y="10" width="120" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="210" y="31" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">ietf-interfaces (RFC 8343)</text><line x1="210" y1="44" x2="210" y2="70"/><line x1="90" y1="70" x2="330" y2="70"/><line x1="90" y1="70" x2="90" y2="90"/><line x1="330" y1="70" x2="330" y2="90"/><rect x="20" y="90" width="140" height="40" rx="4"/><text x="90" y="108" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">dot1cb-stream-</text><text x="90" y="122" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">identification</text><rect x="260" y="90" width="140" height="40" rx="4"/><text x="330" y="114" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">dot1cb-frer</text><line x1="160" y1="110" x2="260" y2="110" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><text x="210" y="105" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">augments</text><rect x="20" y="150" width="140" height="34" rx="4" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><text x="90" y="171" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">SI counters augment</text><rect x="260" y="150" width="140" height="34" rx="4" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><text x="330" y="171" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">FRER counters augment</text><line x1="90" y1="130" x2="90" y2="150"/><line x1="330" y1="130" x2="330" y2="150"/></svg>

caption.en: How the modules stack: both 802.1CB YANG modules and their counters augment the generic ietf-interfaces tree; the FRER module additionally augments Stream Identification.
caption.zh: 模块的堆叠方式：两个 802.1CB YANG 模块及其计数器都扩展通用的 ietf-interfaces 树；FRER 模块还额外扩展流识别模块。

blocks.en: 12.3 (Structure of the YANG model) splits the whole thing into four modules (Table 12-1): two for Stream Identification (a types module and the model module) and two for FRER (likewise). 12.3.1 describes the structure of the ieee802-dot1cb-stream-identification module — its top-level lists (stream-identity, per-port-counters, per-port-per-stream-counters) map directly onto subclauses 9.1, 9.3, and 9.2 — and lists its imports. 12.3.2 does the same for the ieee802-dot1cb-frer module, whose lists (sequence-generation, sequence-recovery, sequence-identification, stream-split, autoconfiguration, plus counters) map onto subclauses 10.3 through 10.9. Both subclauses note that you can resolve the full dependency chain mechanically using tools like pyang or yanglint.
blocks.zh: 12.3（YANG 模型的结构）把整体拆分为四个模块（表 12-1）：两个用于流识别（一个类型模块和模型模块），两个用于 FRER（同理）。12.3.1 描述 ieee802-dot1cb-stream-identification 模块的结构——它的顶层列表（stream-identity、per-port-counters、per-port-per-stream-counters）直接对应子条款 9.1、9.3 与 9.2——并列出其导入项。12.3.2 对 ieee802-dot1cb-frer 模块做同样的事，其列表（序列生成、序列恢复、序列识别、流拆分、自动配置以及计数器）对应子条款 10.3 至 10.9。两个子条款都指出，可以用 pyang 或 yanglint 之类的工具机械地解析出完整的依赖链。

blocks.en: Reading a YANG tree diagram (12.6.1): "rw" before a node means read-write (configuration), "ro" means read-only (state). After a name, "?" marks an optional node, "!" a presence container, and "*" a list or leaf-list. Parentheses enclose a (choice), and each :case inside it is one mutually-exclusive option — exactly how the four stream-identification methods are expressed.
blocks.zh: 读 YANG 树状图（12.6.1）的诀窍：节点名前的「rw」表示可读写（配置），「ro」表示只读（状态）。名称之后，「?」标记可选节点，「!」标记存在容器（presence container），「*」标记列表或叶列表。圆括号包住一个（choice，选择），其中每个 :case 是一个互斥选项——四种流识别方法正是这样表达的。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  C[Network controller] -->|NETCONF over SSH| D[802.1CB device]
  D --> M1[stream-identification module]
  D --> M2[frer module]
  M1 -->|imports types| T1[stream-identification-types]
  M2 -->|imports types| T2[frer-types]
  M2 -->|augments| M1
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  C[网络控制器] -->|基于 SSH 的 NETCONF| D[802.1CB 设备]
  D --> M1[流识别模块]
  D --> M2[FRER 模块]
  M1 -->|导入类型| T1[流识别类型模块]
  M2 -->|导入类型| T2[FRER 类型模块]
  M2 -->|扩展| M1

summary.en: Coverage map: 12.4 imports, 12.5 security, 12.6 module definitions
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：12.4 导入项、12.5 安全、12.6 模块定义

blocks.en: 12.4 (Relationship to other YANG modules) names every module the 802.1CB model leans on. 12.4.1 IEEE 802 Types Module (ieee802-types) — reusable IEEE 802 types; it warns that the MAC-address pattern allows both letter cases, so use upper case to avoid string-comparison mismatches. 12.4.2 IEEE 802.1Q Types Module (ieee802-dot1q-types) — reusable IEEE 802.1 types such as VLAN and priority. 12.4.3 IETF Inet Types Module (ietf-inet-types, RFC 6021) — reusable internet types (IP addresses, ports, DSCP). 12.4.4 IETF Interfaces YANG Module (ietf-interfaces, RFC 8343) — models a port as an interface; the 802.1CB counters augment its statistics. 12.4.5 the Stream Identification Types module — reusable Stream Identification types. 12.4.6 the Stream Identification module — provides identification plus a stream handle that FRER reuses. 12.4.7 the FRER Types module — reusable FRER types. 12.5 (Security Considerations) explains the model is accessed via a network configuration protocol such as NETCONF (RFC 6241), whose mandatory secure transport is SSH (RFC 6242) and whose access control is governed by RFC 6536; administrators must restrict read/write access to authorized users. 12.5.1 and 12.5.2 give the per-module version of that warning for the stream-identification and frer modules respectively: their read-write/read-only objects are sensitive, and operations like edit-config/delete-config in a non-secure environment can harm network operation. 12.6 (Definition of 802.1CB YANG modules) is the normative payload: 12.6.1 the YANG data scheme tree definitions (the readable +--rw/+--ro trees, including the symbol legend) and 12.6.2 the full YANG data module definitions — the actual source for stream-identification-types, stream-identification, frer-types, and frer. Users may freely reproduce these modules; an ASCII copy is attached to the PDF and hosted at the IEEE 802.1 website.
blocks.zh: 12.4（与其他 YANG 模块的关系）列出 802.1CB 模型依赖的每个模块。12.4.1 IEEE 802 类型模块（ieee802-types）——可复用的 IEEE 802 类型；它提醒 MAC 地址模式允许大小写字母，故应统一用大写以避免字符串比较不匹配。12.4.2 IEEE 802.1Q 类型模块（ieee802-dot1q-types）——可复用的 IEEE 802.1 类型，如 VLAN 与优先级。12.4.3 IETF Inet 类型模块（ietf-inet-types，RFC 6021）——可复用的互联网类型（IP 地址、端口、DSCP）。12.4.4 IETF 接口 YANG 模块（ietf-interfaces，RFC 8343）——把端口建模为接口；802.1CB 的计数器扩展其统计。12.4.5 流识别类型模块——可复用的流识别类型。12.4.6 流识别模块——提供识别功能以及供 FRER 复用的流句柄（handle）。12.4.7 FRER 类型模块——可复用的 FRER 类型。12.5（安全考量）说明该模型通过 NETCONF（RFC 6241）等网络配置协议访问，其强制安全传输为 SSH（RFC 6242），访问控制遵循 RFC 6536；管理员必须把读写权限限制给授权用户。12.5.1 与 12.5.2 分别给出针对流识别模块与 FRER 模块的同类警告：它们的可读写/只读对象是敏感的，在不安全环境下执行 edit-config/delete-config 等操作可能损害网络运行。12.6（802.1CB YANG 模块定义）是规范性正文：12.6.1 是 YANG 数据模式树定义（可读的 +--rw/+--ro 树，含符号图例），12.6.2 是完整的 YANG 数据模块定义——即 stream-identification-types、stream-identification、frer-types 与 frer 的真正源码。用户可自由复制这些模块；PDF 附有 ASCII 版本，并托管于 IEEE 802.1 网站。

blocks.en: Beyond Clause 12, two annexes close the loop. Annex A (normative) is the Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement (PICS) proforma — a checklist that an implementer fills in to declare exactly what was built. 802.1CBcv inserts new rows for management options: a top-level YANG option ("does the implementation support management operations using the YANG modules?"), then subclause A.2.9 with one row per module — YANG1 (stream-identification-types, mandatory if YANG), YANG2 (stream-identification, mandatory), YANG3 (frer-types, optional but mandatory if frer is supported), and YANG4 (frer, optional). It also adds A.2.8 for the parallel SMIv2 MIB option. Because PICS is normative, these rows define what "supporting the YANG model" actually means for conformance.
blocks.zh: 在第 12 章之外，两个附录使整体闭环。附录 A（规范性）是协议实现一致性声明（PICS, Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）proforma——一份由实现者填写、用以声明究竟实现了什么的清单。802.1CBcv 为管理选项插入了新行：一个顶层 YANG 选项（「实现是否支持使用 YANG 模块进行管理操作？」），然后是子条款 A.2.9，其中每个模块一行——YANG1（流识别类型，若支持 YANG 则强制）、YANG2（流识别，强制）、YANG3（FRER 类型，可选但若支持 FRER 则强制）、YANG4（FRER，可选）。它还为并行的 SMIv2 MIB 选项添加了 A.2.8。由于 PICS 是规范性的，这些行界定了一致性意义上「支持 YANG 模型」的确切含义。

blocks.en: Annex D (informative) is the Bibliography. The amendment inserts the reference entries that the rest of Clause 12 cites: IEEE Std 802d-2017 (the URN allocation standard), the IETF RFCs that define YANG authoring, NETCONF, NETCONF-over-SSH, NETCONF access control, and interface management (RFC 6087, 6241, 6242, 6536, 8343), the OMG UML 2.5 specification, and the YANG tooling — pyang, yanglint, and the YANG Catalog. As an informative annex it adds no requirements; it simply tells you where each external source lives so you can trace any reference in the standard back to its origin.
blocks.zh: 附录 D（资料性）是参考文献（Bibliography）。该修正案插入了第 12 章其余部分所引用的条目：IEEE Std 802d-2017（URN 分配标准）、定义 YANG 编写、NETCONF、基于 SSH 的 NETCONF、NETCONF 访问控制与接口管理的若干 IETF RFC（RFC 6087、6241、6242、6536、8343）、OMG UML 2.5 规范，以及 YANG 工具——pyang、yanglint 与 YANG Catalog。作为资料性附录，它不增加任何要求；它只是告诉你每个外部来源的出处，使你能把标准中的任何引用追溯到其源头。

blocks.en: The mental model for Clause 12: the standard does not just describe FRER behavior, it ships a machine-readable contract. UML diagrams (12.2) explain the shape, four modules (12.3) package it, imports (12.4) reuse the IETF/IEEE foundations, security notes (12.5) say lock it behind NETCONF/SSH, and the module source (12.6) is the part a controller actually loads. Annex A makes conformance testable; Annex D makes every reference traceable.
blocks.zh: 理解第 12 章的心智模型：该标准不只是描述 FRER 行为，而是交付了一份机器可读的契约。UML 图（12.2）说明形状，四个模块（12.3）将其打包，导入项（12.4）复用 IETF/IEEE 的基础，安全说明（12.5）要求用 NETCONF/SSH 锁住它，而模块源码（12.6）才是控制器真正加载的部分。附录 A 让一致性可被测试；附录 D 让每个引用都可被追溯。

cites.note: 12.2.2 FRER model; 12.3 / 12.3.1 / 12.3.2 module structure and tables
12.4.1-12.4.7 imports; 12.5 / 12.5.1 / 12.5.2 security; 12.6 / 12.6.1 module definitions and tree legend
Annex A PICS proforma (A.2.8 MIB, A.2.9 YANG rows); Annex D Bibliography
